---
title: "Join Us"
---

::: {.section-label}
Opportunities
:::

The lab welcomes curious, collaborative people at all career stages.

---

## PhD & MSc Students

Backgrounds in biology, statistics, or bioinformatics are all welcome.
Programs at Ontario Tech:
[MSc](https://gradstudies.ontariotechu.ca/){target="_blank"} ·
[PhD](https://gradstudies.ontariotechu.ca/){target="_blank"}

---

## Postdoctoral Researchers

Inquiries welcome — especially from candidates developing fellowship
applications (NSERC, Banting, Liber Ero).

---

## Undergraduate Students

Volunteer, thesis, and NSERC USRA opportunities available.

---

::: {.join-callout}
### Get in touch

Email [lab@ontariotechu.ca](mailto:lab@ontariotechu.ca) with subject line
**"Prospective [PhD/MSc/PDF/Undergrad] — [Your Name]"**, a brief note on
your interests, your CV, and contact info for 2–3 references.

[Email the lab](mailto:lab@ontariotechu.ca){.btn-amber}
:::

---

Ontario Tech University is in **Oshawa, Ontario**, in the Greater Toronto Area.
We particularly encourage applications from members of groups underrepresented
in STEM.
